title: Guitar practice habit
goal: Practice guitar most days and play one clean song start-to-finish

habits.title: Warm-up + chords
habits.prompt: 10 minutes: chromatic warm-up, then 5 minutes of open chords with a metronome.
habits.notePrompt: BPM and which chords felt sticky

habits.title: Song chunk
habits.prompt: Practice one section of your target song for 15–20 minutes. Slow is fine.

habits.title: Record a take
habits.prompt: Record one short take (phone is fine) and paste an https link.
